name: Berserker Soul
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>狂戦士の魂</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>バーサーカー・ソウル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When a monster you control inflicts 1500 or less damage to your opponent by a direct attack: Discard your entire hand (min. 1); excavate the top card of your Deck, and if it is a Monster Card, send it to the GY, and if you do that, inflict 500 damage to your opponent, then repeat this effect up to 7 more times or until you excavate a non-Monster Card. If a non-Monster Card is excavated, place it on the top of your Deck. You can only activate 1 "Berserker Soul" per turn.
eff: When a monster you control inflicts 1500 or less damage to your opponent by a direct attack: Discard your entire hand (min. 1); excavate the top card of your Deck, and if it is a Monster Card, send it to the GY, and if you do that, inflict 500 damage to your opponent, then repeat this effect up to 7 more times or until you excavate a non-Monster Card. If a non-Monster Card is excavated, place it on the top of your Deck. You can only activate 1 "Berserker Soul" per turn.

sets.set: Dragons of Legend: The Complete Series

jp_sets.set: Collectors Pack: Duelist of Legend Version

action: Sends excavated cards to the Graveyard
Sends from the top of your Deck to your Graveyard
Places excavated cards on the top of the Deck
